===Pokémon: Twilight Wings===
[[File:Marnie TW.png|thumb|250px|Marnie in [[Pokémon: Twilight Wings]]]]
In ''[[TW04|Early-Evening Waves]]'', Marnie was eating at a [[Battle Café]] with her {{p|Morpeko}} while [[Sonia]] and [[Nessa]] were talking.

In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', Marnie watched the battle between [[Leon]] and [[Raihan]] on her phone together with her {{p|Morpeko}} and [[Piers]] in [[Spikemuth]].

In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Marnie was invited to the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. She was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out to the field for the tournament's opening ceremony.
